meta.source_of_truth: End-of-year review and career narrative. Document leadership, ownership, mentoring, cross-team work, and technical impact.

created_issues.title: If a refresh token is associated with an inactive user, Web should log the user out instead of crash/error page

Campus and Fund Modals should shrink to fit the available options and the footer should have a consistent height
Investigate missing Stripe charge metadata "source" field (ADMIN PR)
Phone number validation on /give/payment - You can't delete the first number you type

open_prs.title: chore: always show cents on giving history

check_ins.content:
, March 16
Short week. I was OOO on Monday.

, March 17
Arch Pod
PR work: phone/email updates for cluster & admin; web auth redirect bug; LaunchDarkly gating + redirect so non–full-platform churches can give on web
DI site update for Emily (Core Values) + typo fixes
PR reviews; sync with Vitor on Web Giving; dug into iOS Chrome–only issue
Reviews included: phone field delete fix (APO-7806), search bars on Fund/Location filters, iOS Chrome scroll dimensions (APO-7719)
Linear: completed APO-7641, APO-7506, APO-7472; worked APO-7349, APO-6912, APO-6612; created APO-7806

, March 18
PR reviews (incl. image deploy / tagging, Tap-Linking in staging, APO-7537 favicon, recurring gifts pagination, APO-7545 embedPreferClose, disable Amplitude for web + web-embeds)
Mobile → web auth handoff: performance testing; quick huddle with Gerard
Opened PRs for Dev X on handoff, perf on handoff, and web auth sign-up bug
Heavy time with Vitor on Web Giving
Also (from next-day recap): merge-queue help for Nick, giving email redesign, Vitor feedback on saving profile + PushPay redirect + new flag, huddle with Tyler & Shahbano
Linear: completed APO-7513; worked APO-7726, APO-7513; created APO-7843 (Stripe charge metadata source / ADMIN PR)

, March 19
Merged: mock imports / no dynamic import for handle/give/payment test (apollos-admin); env overrides for redirect service + web (apollos-platforms)
In flight: recurring gift confirmation email aligned with Donation Receipt; save name/phone/email on /give/payment; gate /give redirect on LD for non–full-platform (apollos-admin)
Reviews: improved image deploy pipeline; plus reviews on save-profile and gate-redirect PRs
Linear active: APO-6912, APO-6862

, March 20
Web Giving polish with Vitor (Slack); lots of PR reviews
Merged: save name/phone/email on /give/payment**; gate/give` redirect on LD for non–full-platform
In flight: always show cents on giving history; strip non-digits from phone on payment form
Reviews: e.g. APO-7893 refresh-session logout, APO-7887 campus/fund modals, Astro local auth token, migration panel/pagination filters, APO-6722 email auto-focus
Linear: created APO-7893, APO-7888, APO-7887; active APO-7898, APO-7888
